{{Quote|Manny Both-Hanz died to bring us this information.|Mon Mothma|<ref name="jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref>}}
'''Manuel "Manny" Both-Hanz''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He had a romantic relationship with [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], the Alliance [[Chief of State (Alliance)/Legends|Chief of State]], and died while trying to get the plans to the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] to the Alliance.

==Biography==
===Critical mission===
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Manny Both-Hanz discovered the existence of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]; he was also able to pinpoint the exact location of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] new [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], and learned that [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor himself]] would be personally overseeing the final stages of the construction.<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition">''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]''</ref>

In the hopes of getting this information to the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]], [[Tag Greenly|Tag Greenley]] and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]] alongside [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] went to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to rendezvous with a contact who would lead them to him. Calrissian spoke with a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] named [[Kannen Doom]]. Greenley and Otauna, believing Calrissian was getting distracted and flirting with a random woman, utilized their [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] disguises to pull Calrissian away from her at gunpoint. Calrissian revealed that she was the contact, but the two said that she didn't look like a 'Manuel.' Calrissian explained that she was going to lead them to Manuel Both-Hanz and had wasted their chance by scaring her away.<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition" />

After infiltrating [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Palace]] with Greenly dressed in [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and Otauna in a disguise, Doom saved the two from being eaten by the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]], believing Greenly to have truly been her old love, Boba Fett. Once Doom took off her helmet, Greenley and Otauna recognized her as the one who was supposed to bring them to Both-Hanz. Once they told her where they had hidden Fett, Doom brought out Both-Hanz, Greenley and Otauna suprised by his small stature. Both-Hanz revealed that he had the plans for a second Death Star, which the Empire had been able to build because of a good insurance policy given to them by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]. Tragically, Both-Hanz was shot by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in an altercation in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], but Tag and Bink successfully passed on the information to [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], enabling the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] to destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition" />

===Legacy===
While on [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']], Tag and Bink reported to Mothma who requested them to present Both-Hanz to the [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial High Command]], so that the Empire wouldn't suspect that the transaction was succeeded. Dressed as [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guards]], they delivered his body to the Death Star.<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition" />

Later during the briefing before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Mothma recounted with grief in her voice that "Manny Both-Hanz died in the process" of bringing the information to them.<ref name="jedi" />

==Behind the scenes==
Manuel Both-Hanz appears only in [[Kevin Rubio]]'s parody comic book ''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]''; his name is a pun on the line "Many [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] died" in Mon Mothma's dialogue in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]'' {{1st}}
